summary: P2 Location-Based Filtering Testing - Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: LocationSelectionModal working correctly with custom dropdown, country selection saves to localStorage, UI shows Cameroon/Local indicator.

integration_issues.issue: Mixed content error - notifications endpoint called with HTTP instead of HTTPS

backend_api_tests.hotels_with_US_filter_global: PASS - Returns 8 hotels (all, non-African = global view)
backend_api_tests.ip_info_endpoint: PASS - Returns IP and location info

frontend_tests.location_modal_custom_dropdown: PASS - Custom dropdown opens successfully (fixed from iteration 27)
frontend_tests.select_cameroon: PASS - Can select Cameroon (CM) from dropdown
frontend_tests.confirm_location: PASS - Confirm Location saves to localStorage
frontend_tests.hotels_page_location_text: PASS - Hotels page shows 'across Cameroon' text

critical_code_review_comments: LocationSelectionModal fixed with custom HTML dropdown instead of Radix Select - works inside Dialog now
Frontend services.js correctly adds country param to all service API calls via getLocationParam()
Backend location_filter.py correctly handles both direct country field and operator-based lookup
Non-African countries correctly return all results (global view)
Minor: Mixed content warning on notifications endpoint (HTTP vs HTTPS)
seed_data_creation: No new data created - using existing seed data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Location-based filtering is fully functional. Backend supports country param on all service endpoints. Frontend LocationSelectionModal uses custom dropdown that works inside Dialog. localStorage key is 'oryno_user_location'. Services in Africa: hotels(8), events(5), restaurants(8), car_rental(5), travel_routes(9), cinema(4), pressing(5), banquets(5), packages(4). The main agent's fix from iteration 27 (custom dropdown) resolved the Select/Dialog interaction issue.

rca_of_the_issue.issue: Previous iteration 27 had Select dropdown not opening inside Dialog
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Radix UI Dialog and Select components had interaction conflict with portals and focus trap
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Main agent replaced Radix Select with custom HTML dropdown using button and absolute positioned div
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Tested and confirmed working - dropdown opens, countries list visible, selection saves correctly
